title: Saved Search Alerts
notes: As a compliance coordinator, I want to save a search and receive notifications when new documents match it, so that I can monitor important document categories without rerunning the same search every day.

title: Metadata Templates for Batch Uploads
notes: As an archive assistant, I want reusable metadata templates that I can apply to a batch of documents, so that I can upload large document sets quickly and consistently.
